subject: A uniformed figure in a cluttered archive room, surrounded by scrolls and documents animated by blue magical energy
description: A figure in a crisp pale military or bureaucratic uniform — white jacket with structured shoulders, brown leather cross-body straps, and a visible badge or insignia pin — stands in the middle of a cluttered archive room. Their arms are extended outward as several rolled scrolls and documents levitate and swirl around them, connected by coiling blue magical energy. Additional stacks of paper and books are piled on every surface. In the background, shelves, a lantern or torch source, and faintly glowing signs suggest an active operations center or records room. A small blue glass bottle also floats nearby. The figure's expression is focused and composed, controlling the flow of documents with apparent ease.
foreground: Uniformed figure with arms extended, blue magical energy animating floating scrolls and documents around them
background: Cluttered archive room with shelves, stacked papers, lantern light, and glowing signs
